title: The Sanji Retrieval Team
description: On pages 8–11, this part focuses on the sanji retrieval team within the The Road to Whole Cake Island storyline.
scene: The story widens beyond Zou as the world prepares for the Reverie and the Sanji retrieval team moves toward Big Mom’s territory.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: What the heck is going on?! is that electro?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Quickly! Furl the sails! They'll get shredded by the wind!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: You need to help out too!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Right now, Carrot's sailing the seas?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Why didn't you mention this earlier, bariete?

dialogue.speaker: Bepo
dialogue.text: I'm sorry-Gosaru! I wanted to, Wanda, but Carrot said if I told anyone, they'd stop her, and...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Carrot quietly gathered up her things...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I am not sure if this is the same thing.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Carrot wanted to betray you, Wanda!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I know. It's okay. I'm glad I learned sooner rather than later.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: was actually beginning to worry where she'd gone.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: If Luffy and the others are with her, she should be okay.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: If you want us to keep watch, we can post guards.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Our enemies probably have a vivre card leading them to this place.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: How in the world did they get their hands on such a thing?!

dialogue.speaker: Momonosuke
dialogue.text: I can only hope it was lost along with their ship when Zuneshaa sunk it.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: They'll come back again, won't they?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Pull me the fuck outta here...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Lord Jack's Joker Rescue Mission ended in Failure as well...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: With this, the final nail has been driven into the coffin of our synthetic devil fruit, smile, trade.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: So you're telling me we won't be able to make...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I guess today he's being a sentimental drunk.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I had my heart set on an only-devil fruit user pirate crew! The best this world has ever seen!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Those kids just killed that dream half. Grown!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Poor joker! You just happened to be too damn weak...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: But this straw hat! He's been generating a lot of buzz,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Just what the hell do you think will happen, JS eh?!

summary: The Sanji Retrieval Team: The story widens beyond Zou as the world prepares for the Reverie and the Sanji retrieval team moves toward Big Mom’s territory.
